title: UI/UX - Verify screen layout on device rotation (Login Screen)
description: Checks for UI breakages or layout issues when the device is rotated between portrait and landscape modes.
preconditions: User is on the Login screen.

steps.description: 1. On the Login screen, rotate the device to landscape mode.
2. Verify all UI elements are visible and not overlapping.
3. Rotate the device back to portrait mode.
4. Verify the layout returns to its original state without issues.

expected_result: The UI layout adapts correctly to both portrait and landscape orientations without any visual glitches or loss of functionality.
